summary: Frontend-only Playwright E2E run on iteration-2 of the MMRDA AI Land-Title demo. Verified all 4 newly added screens (Projects list, New Project form, Workflow, Valuation, Reports) plus the cross-app multi-project switching mechanism (header switcher + localStorage persistence). 28/28 critical assertions PASSED. No JS console errors or page errors observed. Quick smoke pass on prior iter-1 flows (Login, Dashboard, Chatbot scripted retrieval) confirms no regression.
tests_executed: Dashboard projects-grid renders + 3 project-card-* tiles + 'New Acquisition' navigates to /projects/new
Header project-switcher opens dropdown; switch-project-MMRDA-2026-0098 selects Clear project
Projects page: projects-new-btn present + open-project-MMRDA-2026-0117 switches active project AND navigates to /workspace
New Project form: empty submit shows error toast; filled submit triggers np-stage-0..4 progress; np-open-workspace appears after ~3.5s
Workflow page: stage-doc-upload + stage-final timeline cards render, all 4 pending-action-act-* cards render
Valuation page: val-category, val-zone, val-usage, val-urbanrural inputs render; 8 val-out-* breakdown cells render
Reports page: all 4 report-card-{title,risk,ownership,valuation}-report render; report-pdf-title-report click triggers loading + success toast
Persistence: switching to MMRDA-2026-0098 then page reload preserves activeId in localStorage
Regression: Chatbot 'Is the title clear?' suggested-prompt still produces Conditional answer with 92% confidence + cited snippet
critical_code_review_comments: ProjectProvider correctly persists activeId via useEffect + falls back to PROJECTS[0] if localStorage has stale ID — good defensive coding.
App.js Route '/' uses isAuthed() at module-render only; same caveat as iter-1 (cosmetic, no impact for this mock app).

data-testid coverage on the 4 new screens is comprehensive and matches the review-request spec exactly (project-switcher, switch-project-{id}, projects-new-btn, open-project-{id}, np-create-btn, np-stage-0..4, np-open-workspace, stage-{id}, pending-action-{id}, val-category/zone/usage/urbanrural, val-out-*, report-card-{id}, report-pdf-{id}).

PROJECTS, WORKFLOW_STAGES, PENDING_ACTIONS, REPORTS, LAND_CATEGORIES, RR_ZONES, USAGE_TYPES are all consistent and parse cleanly — the mockData.js syntax issue from the prior iteration is fully resolved.
test_credentials: Mock auth — any non-empty username/password accepted. Pre-filled: officer / mmrda@2026, role 'Legal Officer'. localStorage keys: mmrda_user (auth), mmrda_active_project (active project).
seed_data_creation: None — all data is static mock data in /app/frontend/src/data/mockData.js (3 projects).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration-2 fully passes. All 4 new screens (Projects, NewProject, Workflow, Valuation, Reports) and the multi-project switcher work end-to-end. Active project ID 'MMRDA-2026-0098' / 'MMRDA-2026-0117' / 'MMRDA-2026-0142' switches via header [data-testid=project-switcher] -> dropdown options [data-testid=switch-project-{id}], or via Projects page [data-testid=open-project-{id}], or by clicking dashboard project-card-{id}. New Project provisioning is purely an animation (3.5s) — no API call. Reports PDF/Excel exports are toast-only (no real file produced). Sidebar has 9 enabled + 2 disabled (Legal Review, Settings).
rca of the issue: No issues found in this iteration.
